rows.title: App Visualization Idea: When the user is playing, the intervals…
rows.excerpt: App Visualization Idea: When the user is playing, the intervals from the current root note are what gets color coded, in terms of primary, secondary, etc. This way modulation possibilities become immediately apparent and transposable via the same color coding as any previous key.
